Appearances:
Plaintiff Shree Balaj Partnership is present. Represented by Bibek Rawai.
Attorney Howard Olsen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Murillo Benny is present.
Attorney Mehran Fardis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnik, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of July-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
